Package com.rays.common

Class BaseDAOImpl<T extends BaseDTO>

java.lang.Object
com.rays.common.BaseDAOImpl<T>
Type Parameters:
T - type of entity extending BaseDTO
All Implemented Interfaces:
BaseDAOInt<T>
Direct Known Subclasses:
AttachmentDAOImpl, CollegeDAOImpl, CourseDAOImpl, FacultyDAOImpl, MarksheetDAOImpl, RoleDAOImpl, StudentDAOImpl, SubjectDAOImpl, TimeTableDAOImpl, UserDAOImpl
public abstract class BaseDAOImpl<T extends BaseDTO> extends Object implements BaseDAOInt<T>
Generic JPA implementation of BaseDAOInt. Provides common CRUD operations, search functionality, and utility methods for all entity DAOs.
Author:
Saket
